subject: Young female-presenting fighter in orange and red outfit in dynamic rushing action pose
description: A young female-presenting humanoid figure lunges forward in a full rushing charge pose — weight fully committed forward, one arm extended, legs driving. She wears an orange-red outfit with a jacket/vest. Intense yellow-orange energy bursts radiate behind and around her, and the motion blur and energy trails reinforce high-speed movement. This is a more dynamic action rendering than the BT3-009 variant — full forward momentum rather than a ready stance.
foreground: Young fighter in orange-red outfit, full rushing charge, arm extended
background: Intense yellow-orange energy burst and motion trails
